On the one hand they have to excel in their academics, the standards of which keep rising, while on the other hand they have to keep pace with technology; read-more How It Works Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic offers Comprehensive Mental Health Care by reputed and experienced Neuro Psychiatrist, Clinical Psychologists and Counsellors. The set up & the location of the clinic has been attracting people who want a better quality of life and solutions with total confidentiality. The clinic is located in a convenient and well-connected area with ample parking space making it easy to get in and out of the clinic. You will experience minimal waiting periods, comfortable seating, and convenient appointment-making system with exclusive privacy and confidentiality. This means that clients can discuss their issues in total confidence and without worry or any hesitation. Well planned time slots and fixed number of appointments in a day ensure complete individual attention to problems. Well trained support staff ensures there are no disturbances of any kind. Clients are given ample time and opportunity to discuss their problems in a calm and comfortable environment. Clients get to choose their next appointment date and timing; they are even helped to decide what mode of treatment they are comfortable with. After detailed history, the Psychiatrist may ask for Psychometric Assessments to understand the problem in more depth. Later the treating team helps the client choose the right mode of treatment: with Medicines, Counselling and Psychotherapy, or a prudent combination of both. A well balanced treatment approach ensures speedy recovery and long lasting improvement without relapses. The doctors are committed to improve the quality of mental well being of anyone who visits Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic. Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic When you are looking for Competent, Ethical, Confidential Mental Health Care, Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic is the place you are looking for!﻿﻿ Consultant Psychiatrist, specializing in NeuroPsychiatry & Psycho Therapy. Contact Testimonials You get lot of confidence after speaking to him. I would highly recommend. He is a complete authority in his field of Psychiatry. Excellent diagnosis, perfect counselling, expert treatment & the list goes on. You feel at ease when you're treated by such a noble professional. I strongly recommend his services to anyone seeking such a treatment. Thank you Doctor & please keep up the good work. Clinic is state of the art with a lot of clinical tools for diagnosing as well as for treatment. I noticed a positive change within myself during and after the course of my treatment at Pragnya Clinic. I'm feeling much better now compared to what I was a few months ago, before coming to the clinic. I'm quite satisfied with their services overall. Dr.Kartik Kashyap doesn't just leave you in the middle of treatment if something is not working. He takes responsibility and encourages you to be 100 % cured. The fee is well structured and very transparent. Very reasonable. Dr.Kartik Kashyap is really like a good friend to you that makes you extremely calm and comfortable. He never makes you wait and never rushes you out even if the allotted time is up. He doesn’t judge, doesn’t lose patience, and instills a lot of confidence in you. Booking appointments is easy, and the Doctor is always on time. Very professional! Listened to my problems patiently. Psychological assessments are done in-house by other Psychologists. Clear, professional suggestions! Overall, a very good experience! I’m very thankful to the doctor. He provided me proper medication, counselling, and most importantly, few techniques to prevent depression in the future. My life took completely different direction after treatment. Thanks once again! I strongly recommend people who are suffering from any psychological issues to please consult at Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic….and you will be very happy to see the results. The ambience at Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic does not feel like you are going to clinic. The greenery and pleasant surroundings immediately relax anyone! Such good vibes after I walked in here! The motto at Pragnya Clinic is to make the patients depend on their own rather than depending on the medicines. Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic would love your feedback. Post a review to our profile. Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic About Us History of Clinic: Dr. Usha Rao and Dr. Anand Rao , two competent and dedicated Clinical Psychologists had a vision of improving the holistic psychological health of people. This was based on a model of ‘Psychological Wellness’, rather than ‘Psychiatric Illness’. Thus was born ‘Rao’s Clinic’, which constantly kept pace with time and people’s Psychological Needs.  Slowly gaining a strong reputation for being a successful Psycho Clinic & Resource Centre, many Corporates and schools got added to the long list of satisfied clientele. Methods like psychological profiling helped choose the ‘best suited person for the particular job’, yielding higher productivity, better office relations and lower attrition. Teachers at schools were sensitized to issues like of Low Concentration, Learning Disabilities, Hyperactivity and Conduct Problems. Early recognition helps better treatment and lower family stress and irritation. Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic evolved as a need to integrate the neurobiological attributes to the psychosocial approach already in place. Dr. ANAND A. RAO MA, DMSP., Ph.D., FIACP. Consultant Clinical Psychologist Life Fellow-Indian Assn of Clinical Psychologists Registered Consultant - Rehabilitation Council of India (RCI) Dr. KARTIK KASHYAP MBBS., DPM., DNB., MNAMS, FIPS, FIAPP. Consultant Neuro Psychiatrist & Psychotherapist, Life Fellow - Indian Psychiatric Society Life Fellow- Indian Medical Association Life Fellow- Indian Association of Pvt Psychiatry ICH-GCP Certified Clinician, Formerly, Member-Secretary of District Mental Health Board, Member-Psychiatric Disability Certification Board Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic Calm and Comfortable Environment Issues dealt with include consultations for all Neuro Psychiatric Problems like Chronic Headache, Dementia, Delirium, Epilepsy, Psychiatric Problems, Counselling for relational/ Adjustment Problems, Sexual Problems. Contact From 'Rao's Clinic' to 'Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic', the journey has been long and difficult, with changing trends and attitudes towards all things related to mental health. But the core has always remained the same - having the highest ethical standards and diligence to help people attain better mental wellness and enhancing their quality of life. We remain committed to it. Services ISSUES DEALT WITH include Consultations for all Neuro Psychiatric Problems like Chronic Headache, Dementia, Delirium, Epilepsy, Psychiatric Problems, like Depression, Schizophrenia, Deaddiction, Counselling for Relationship/ Adjustment Problems, Sexual Problems, Marital Counselling, Adolescent Behavioural Problems, Childhood problems & Academic Difficulties , Emotional and Stress related problems of day-to-day living Services Available Treatment of all kinds of Psychiatric Disorders / Ailments. Feeling depressed, feeling lonely, not feeling cheerful, having thoughts of ending life, mental tension, not able to relax, episodes of sudden fear / anxiety, social anxiety, Problems with sleep, not able to concentrate. Feeling suspicious, seeing / hearing things which others are not able to see / hear, talking without any meaning, behaving abnormally. Alcohol/ smoking and other substance deaddiction Children not being able to concentrate, poor academic performance, hyperactive/ extremely mischievous, learning disabilities, mental retardation, bed wetting, and other childhood psychiatric disorders. Treatment and counselling for adolescent behavior related problems. Counselling and therapy for sexual marital/ relationship problems. Counselling and treatment of geriatric problems like, poor memory, sudden violence, suspicious, anxiety. Repeated headache and other physical complaints, which does not resolve with routine medication PSYCHOMETRY A Psychometric assessment is done to evaluate mental health problems such as Anxiety Disorders, Depression, Schizophrenia, Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder, Conduct Disorder, Bipolar Disorders and Eating Disorders. We recognize the needs for assessment, selecting the right assessment instruments to cater to these needs. Our Psychometry lab is equipped with the scientifically well validated test materials, to assess various areas such as Diagnostic Evaluations, Neuro Psychological Evaluations, Screening for Evidence of Specific Learning Disabilities & Children with Sub Average Intelligence. Psychometric Evaluations are done to measure the following: Intelligence (IQ) & Aptitude Assessment Memory Attention and Concentration Aptitude Personality Assessments Interpersonal Relations and Adjustments Diagnostic Psychometry Psychodynamics Neuro-Psychological Evaluations Rorschach Psycho Diagnostic Test Thematic Apperception Test (TAT) Differential Aptitude Test (DAT) Specific Learning Disability (SLDS) Psychological Evaluation for job placements / promotions in HR department Professional services are offered to corporate clients as qualified consultants on various aspects of Psychological well-being of employees and families. COUNSELLING & PSYCHOTHERAPY Counselling is an integral part of self development & effectiveness. People are becoming increasingly aware of the need for Counselling Services. Problems of  children, adolescent problems, marital issues, job stress, old age concerns & host of other psycho social problems related to stress & strains of urban life need effective handling by the trained personnel. After detailed assessments, we have a wide gamut of Psychological Therapies to suit the particular problem at hand. Confidential Emotional Counselling Child Guidance/ Counselling Parent- Child Relationship problems Adolescent Problems Career Counselling Individual and Group Therapy Supportive Therapy Family Therapy Marital/ Couple Counselling Relationship Management Stress Management Relaxation Procedures Systematic Desensitization Anxiety Management Anger Management Assertiveness Training Attention / Concentration Enhancement Memory Retraining Mental Motivation Neuro Psychological Rehabilitation Cognitive Retraining Leadership Skills Training Communication Skills Training Cognitive Behavior Therapy Hypnotherapy Rehabilitation Counselling Behavior Modification Personality Modification Children & Adolescents Children today are faced with more challenges than ever before. On the one hand they have to excel in their academics, the standards of which keep rising, while on the other hand they have to keep pace with technology, while at the same time managing their friends, relationships and their personal lives. Some children are restless, hyperactive, have poor concentration, have conduct problems, bedwetting, talking or walking in sleep. There are many students who have a fear of speaking in public, and though they know many of the answers, remain silent for fear of being ridiculed. Several students, unable to handle stress, have psychological problems related to the same. Some of these problems could be not paying attention in class, dropping academic grades, chronic headaches and backaches, frequent anger outbursts and irritability, feeling that they can’t go on, getting tired very easily, not being happy in what they do, not wanting to talk to people, poor quality of sleep, and even thoughts and acts of self-harm/ suicide. Some develop lying, stealing, use of cigarettes, alcohol and other drugs as "stress relief". These add to the problem further. In this tough competitive world, it becomes imperative that we equip our children with the best psychological resources that take them forward towards their goal. These include Concentration enhancement, Memory retraining, Communication skills, Leadership skills, Anger Management, Personality development & Anxiety management. Gallery All Ambience Media Dr. Kartik Kashyap gives an online talk to Law students about mental health issues Dr. Kartik Kashyap talks about Women’s mental health, on DD Chandana Dr. Kartik Kashyap gives mental health tips on FM 93.5  on New year’s day, and encourages people  to have a resolution of “A Happy Mind leads to a healthier body” Dr. Kartik Kashyap talks on FM Radio City about Depression and its management, on occasion of World Mental Health Day Dr. Kartik Kashyap on a live phone in program on Kalki TV, about Family issues impacting children’s mental health Dr. Kartik Kashyap spoke on " Untangling Bipolar Disorder with Comorbid Substance Use Disorder", at a symposium on Bipolar Disorder. Topics covered ranged from historical aspects of Bipolar disorder to substances causing Mood disorder, and its varied management regimens Dr. Kartik Kashyap gives his valuable insights on “ Dream Analysis” in Vijaya Karnataka Dr. Kartik Kashyap Gives his insights on “ Mano Chintana” a public awareness program on Mental Health, on DD Dr. Kartik Kashyap gives tips on overcoming Exam related Anxiety Contact Us  for Appointment Consultations are only by appointments, which ensure that clients need not wait, and great care is taken to protect confidentiality of the clients. Exclusive time slots and fixed number of appointments ensure complete individual attention to problems. Pragnya Brain Mind Clinic Clinic works from 10 am to 8pm, Monday to Saturday 281, 100 Feet Ring road, 7 th Block Banashankari 3 rd Stage, Bangalore 560 085 (Next to YES Bank, Opp  Kamakya BMTC Bus Depot) P: 080 26692888 / 080 26693788 (10 am to 8pm, Monday to Saturday) E: pragnya.brainmind@gmail.com Copyright © 2017.
